message:
refactor(tests): replace unreachable with panic and rename fencing token variables

Replace unreachable!() with panic!() in conformance, e2e, integration,
perf, security, and TUI test modules for clippy compliance. Rename
auth_tkn/auth_fencing_tkn/auth_stale_tkn/auth_older_tkn variables to
token/fencing_token/stale_token/older_token for clarity in e2e adjacent
substrate flow tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
